title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Sharekhan - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Sharekhan - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
